name: 血之回响触发
description: 失去圣盾时触发，添加圣光充能手牌
code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const sourcePiece = context.sourcePiece; if (!sourcePiece) return { success: false }; const liadrin = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'liadrin' && p.faction === sourcePiece.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!liadrin) return { success: false }; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; }); if (player) { addCardToHand('holy-charge', player.playerId); return { success: true, message: '血之回响：获得1张圣光充能' }; } return { success: false }; }
